author: y4rr
content: Surfaced by phase 2.2 conformance dispatch (#764). When invoked on a CUDA tensor, ProdBackward (ferrotorch-core/src/grad_fns/reduction.rs:323) returns NotImplementedOnCuda. The forward path runs on GPU (native PTX prod kernel) but autograd cannot complete. Repro: cargo test -p ferrotorch-core --test conformance_reduction --features gpu gpu_prod. Expected: ProdBackward should compute the prefix/suffix-product gradient and place it on the input's device, mirroring AmaxBackward/AminBackward's CPU-compute-then-upload strategy. Test #764 marks this case with #[ignore = "blocked on #785"].
